emails.subject: Re: brown bags
emails.body: Sorry to inform you but Jen Fraser has just cancelled her brown bag for today. Don't forget to sign up for next week's with Mike McConnell. Call me if you have any questions. Stacey 30945 Forwarded by Stacey Dempsey/HR/Corp/Enron on 11/14/2000 07:58 AM Stacey Dempsey 11/13/2000 09:01 AM
